programs.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programs.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programs.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programs.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programs.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programs.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programs.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programs.sub_title: Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programs.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programs.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programs.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Rachael shows how to make a marinated vegetable-infused dish of tteokbokki, a popular Korean food made from rice cakes.
